ko: 교과서 영어 vs 실제 영어. 우리가 실제로 쓰는 영어야. 하나,
ja: 教科書英語 vs 実際の英語。私たちが実際に使う英語だよ。1つ目、
zhTW: 教科書英語 vs 真正的英語。這是我們實際使用的英語。第一，
vi: Tieng Anh sach giao khoa vs tieng Anh thuc te. Day la tieng Anh chung ta thuc su dung. Mot,

en: This is the English we actually use. One, you are doing exceptionally well.
ko: 교과서 영어 vs 실제 영어. 우리가 실제로 쓰는 영어야. 하나,
zhTW: 「you are doing exceptionally well」。我們實際怎麼說？
vi: you are doing exceptionally well. Chung ta thuc su noi gi?

en: What do we actually say? You're crushing it or you're killing it.
ko: you are doing exceptionally well. 실제로 뭐라고 해? You're crushing it
zhTW: You're crushing it 或 you're killing it。
vi: You're crushing it hoac you're killing it.

en: Two, I am very pleased with your actions.
ko: 또는 you're killing it. 둘, I am very pleased with your actions. 실제로
ja: 2つ目、「I am very pleased with your actions」。実際は？
zhTW: 第二，I am very pleased with your actions。我們怎麼說？
vi: Hai, I am very pleased with your actions. Chung ta noi gi?

en: What do we really say? You're a legend, you're a legend.
Three, I need to depart now.
ko: You're a legend. 셋, I need to depart now. 실제로
ja: 3つ目、「I need to depart now」。実際は？
zhTW: 第三，I need to depart now。我們怎麼說？
vi: Ba, I need to depart now. Chung ta noi gi?

en: What do we actually say? I've gotta run or I'm off.
ko: 뭐라고 해? I've gotta run 또는 I'm off. 넷,
zhTW: I've gotta run 或 I'm off。第四，
vi: I've gotta run hoac I'm off. Bon,

en: Four, I find this rather confusing.
ko: I find this rather confusing. 실제로 뭐라고 해?
zhTW: I find this rather confusing。我們怎麼說？
vi: I find this rather confusing. Chung ta noi gi?

ko: you are doing exceptionally well. 실제로 뭐라고 해? You're crushing it
vi: Chung ta thuc su noi gi?

en: I'm totally lost or this is doing my head in.
ko: I'm totally lost 또는 this is doing my head in. This is doing my
ja: 「I'm totally lost」か「this is doing my head in」。
zhTW: I'm totally lost 或 this is doing my head in。
vi: I'm totally lost hoac this is doing my head in.

en: This is doing my head in. Have I missed any?
ko: head in. 빠뜨린 거 있어? 댓글로 알려줘.
ja: This is doing my head in。何か見逃した？
zhTW: This is doing my head in。我有漏掉嗎？
vi: This is doing my head in. Toi co bo sot gi khong?

en: Let me know in the comments.
ko: head in. 빠뜨린 거 있어? 댓글로 알려줘.
vi: Hay cho toi biet trong binh luan.
